title: WAF Signal Correlation with Application Traces
description: Correlates OCI WAF signals (x-oci-waf-score, x-oci-waf-action) captured by application middleware with the full request trace. Links WAF detection to application-level security spans and database queries.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Attack Type' = 'security_misconfig' | stats count as WafEvents, unique('WAF Score') as WafScores by 'Client IP', 'Service Name', 'URI Path' | sort -WafEvents

ask_ai_prompts: Summarize which client IPs and routes have the strongest WAF signal concentration.
Explain whether the observed WAF scores look like probing, bypass attempts, or noisy false positives.

falsepositives: WAF in detection-only mode generating informational signals
